sections.paragraph:
παραβύω (βύω ‘to stuff’) 1 aor. παρέβυσα (Hippocr. et al.) plunge into π. ξιφίδιον plunge a dagger into (a body) MPol 16:1 (Lucian, Toxar. 58 παραβύειν ἐς τὴν πλευρὰν τὸν ἀκινάκην).—DELG s.v. βυνέω.

aor. aor. = aorist

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 760
